changes.title: Army lists updated for version 2.25!
description: Apologies for the delay - real life has been a bit hectic with some employment changes!
You can now create army lists that align wiht version 2.25 of the Warmaster Revolutions Army Book.
It is highly recommended that you review your existing lists and ensure they align with the new update.

changes.title: UI Improvements
description: Improved screen space on main screens

changes.title: Allow access to charts from Tracker home screen
description: Improved screen space on main screens

changes.title: Fix to Blunder and Scouting chart navigation
description: The buttons on the Tracker home screen should now navigate to the correct screen.

changes.title: Special Rules fixes
description: The preview for some unit's special rules has been fixed.
